AIMakAra (SI. 1. Adh Ill) says: has been dedared by the ancient
sages Vasishta, Sukra. Parasara. etc., that several Yogas whether good
or bad in the nativities of human beings depend on the planets
constituting them, and that the effects in turn depend upon the
Yogas.'When the planets are ill-placed. the man is dWarfed. In the case
of a plamet owning two houses. the house which happens to be
Moo1atrikona will predominate and Its effects alone will be felt full while
the effects of own house will be half. The effects of both the 8havas
wll come to pass In the Oasa of the planets.
The above views should be borne in mind while anatysilg the Yogas.
Such references can be found in the works of varal\amihira who mentions
his predecessors such as Vasishta, Gargi, Parasara. Vyasa. Badarayana.
Soma, Ka:syapa, Satyacharya, Yavana, Chanakya and Vishnugupta.
